summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM monetization flow. Backend APIs working perfectly with visible/internal totals separation. Admin leads page displays monetization columns correctly with hidden margin indicators.

minor_issues.issue: Quote creation response doesn't return visibleTotal/internalTotal in response body
minor_issues.impact: Data is stored correctly but not visible in API response for debugging

integration_issues.issue: Calculator section only appears when VIN search returns price data
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior - calculator requires price to function

passed_tests: Calculator API returns visible total ($22,139) and internal total ($23,539) with $1,400 hidden margin
Quote creation stores both visible and internal totals
Lead creation from quote includes metadata with internalTotal and hiddenFee
Quick lead creation without quote works correctly
Admin leads page displays both 'Ціна клієнта' and 'Внутрішня ціна' columns
Hidden margin (+$1400) displayed correctly next to internal price
VIN column present in leads table
Lead filtering and search functionality working
Lead creation modal opens and form fields accessible
